team_name: TenderTrace: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Audit Platform
summary: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement. Automates the entire tender evaluation process end-to-end using Google Gemini 1.5 Flash, Google Vision API, Apache PDFBox, Apache POI, iText 7, and H2.
optimization_claims: Automates the entire tender evaluation process
Generates a downloadable, audit-ready PDF report
constraints_addressed: Manual evaluation of hundreds of pages of bidder documents
